ai_metadata.reasoning: Facing a massive 12.5 BB open and a flat caller, A8s is heavily dominated by stronger Aces and pocket pairs in their ranges. With only 11 BBs, we have no fold equity and terrible equity to call all-in multiway.

steps.note: While open-shoving A8s for 11 BBs is standard in an unopened pot, doing so here would have resulted in getting called by Manchest's pocket Queens and busting on this runout.
Folding to the large open was the perfect play; had you called or shoved, you would have been dominated by Manchest's QQ and lost your entire stack.

analysis.summary: You correctly folded a marginal suited Ace against heavy pre-flop action. This disciplined laydown saved your stack from being eliminated by pocket Queens.
